---
title: "Pharmaverse — Clinical R & ADaM Ecosystem"
description: "Open-source R packages for clinical programming, ADaM, and submission-ready workflows."
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.callout-important}
**Status: Coming soon** — See [Clinical R](clinical-r.qmd) for related content.
:::

## 1. Introduction

**Pharmaverse** is a community of R packages (admiral, metacore, metatools, pharmaRTF, and others) used for clinical dataset development and analysis in pharmaceutical programming.

[Back to home](index.qmd)
